---
title: "Josefina Silva Fuentealba"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:josefinasilvafuente@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JosefinaSilva96
---

Junior Economist with experience in international organisations, 
specialising in public finance and governance, quantitative policy analysis, and 
country-level diagnostics. Currently at the World Bank Group.

Fluent in English, French, and Spanish.
